chapter_title.en: Chapter on Fulfilling the Acts of Grooming (qada' Al-tafath)

text: 3034 - وَ رَوَى زُرَارَةُ عَنْ حُمْرَانَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «أَنَّ اَلتَّفَثَ حُفُوفُ اَلرَّجُلِ مِنَ اَلطِّيبِ فَإِذَا قَضَى نُسُكَهُ حَلَّ لَهُ اَلطِّيبُ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3034 - In a narration by Zurara from Humran, from Abu Ja'far (as):
"The tafath refers to a man's avoidance of perfumes. Once he has completed his rites, perfume becomes permissible for him."
